headline: Is Investing In XRP A Good Idea In This Macro Environment?
summary: XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) dropped to around $1.28 today, after fresh U.S. strikes on Iran sent the entire crypto market lower. The reason the token keeps falling has almost nothing to do with Ripple, which has been winning institutional deals all year. XRP completed a tokenized Treasury settlement with JPMorgan in May, has attracted $1.41 billion ... Is Investing In XRP A Good Idea In This Macro Environment?
